data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified navigation to reduce user decision time.
data.technical_spec: Minimal menu items with clear call-to-action buttons.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimal size and position of interactive elements for ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Primary buttons placed within the natural reach of the mouse pointer.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Logical grouping of related content to enhance comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Sections separated by whitespace, aligning related items closely.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Familiar web design conventions to leverage user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Common UI patterns such as top navigation and search bars.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design believed to be more usable by users.
data.technical_spec: Highly polished user interface with a modern aesthetic.
